entity.label: Hashabniah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the Levites whom Ezra appointed to interpret the law to the people (Neh. 9:5).

nodes.label: Hashabniah
nodes.description: One of the Levites whom Ezra appointed to interpret the law to the people (Neh. 9:5).

verses.text: Then the Levites, Jeshua, and Kadmiel, Bani, Hashabniah, Sherebiah, Hodijah, Shebaniah, and Pethahiah, said, Stand up and bless the LORD your God for ever and ever: and blessed be thy glorious name, which is exalted above all blessing and praise.
